BOTTLED_TORNADO.description: Upon pickup, choose a Power card from your [gold]deck[/gold] and [gold]enchant[/gold] it with: [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
BOTTLED_TORNADO.flavor: [red]The details of this relic will not be revealed...[/red]
BOTTLED_TORNADO.title: Bottled Tornado
BOTTLED_FLAME.description: Upon pickup, choose an Attack card from your [gold]deck[/gold] and [gold]enchant[/gold] it with: [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].
BOTTLED_FLAME.flavor: [red]The details of this relic will not be revealed...[/red]
BOTTLED_FLAME.title: Bottled Flame
BOTTLED_LIGHTNING.description: Upon pickup, choose a Skill card from your [gold]deck[/gold] and [gold]enchant[/gold] it with: [purple]{Enchantment}[/purple].

BOTTLED_LIGHTNING.title: Bottled Lightning
ORANGE_PELLETS.description: Whenever you play a Power, Attack, and Skill in the same turn, remove all of your Debuffs.
ORANGE_PELLETS.flavor: Manufactured from various fungi found throughout the Spire. Holds off any affliction.
ORANGE_PELLETS.title: Orange Pellets
